title: cymbalaria muralis f. toutonii
intro: Cymbalaria muralis f. toutonii, also known as the small wallwort, is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region, characterized by its small, yellowish-green flowers and heart-shaped leaves. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties, making it effective in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. The health benefits of Cymbalaria muralis f. toutonii include its ability to reduce inflammation, soothe sore throats, and ease congestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Cymbalaria muralis f. toutonii can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or using the plant in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
